blended.narrative: Red Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
